progress_summary: v1.2 feature batch complete. Three new scenarios shipped (mcp-enterprise-f500, mcp-enterprise-defense, pm-pipeline-linear), five SKILL.md files updated with PM-MCP integration prose (integrations-engineer canonical owner; app-architect / git-ops / deploy-ops / monitoring-ops phase-specific behaviors), versions bumped 1.0->1.2 (or 1.1->1.2 for app-architect), /changelog page added, homepage v1.2 pill linking to it, styleguide badge bumped to v1.2.0. Build green; 108/108 tests pass; skill catalog validates with 17 skills.

progress_table.label: Sprint 3: Skills v1.2 PM-MCP prose updates
Sprint 4: v1.2 site surface + Linear scenario

key_decisions: Option C: updated SKILL.md prose to teach PM-MCP behavior AND added a /changelog marketing surface.
Two MCP-enterprise scenarios: F500 healthcare (MeridianHealth, HIPAA + ISO + SOC2) and defense contractor (Daedalus Aerospace, CMMC L3 + FedRAMP High + IL5 + ITAR).
PM tools in scope: Linear (named tool in v1.2 hero scenario), Jira + GitHub Issues called out as drop-in alts. Monday dropped per user request.
v1.2 is a content/marketing label; runtime __OPCHAIN_VERSION__ remains git-SHA-stamped.
shortDesc has a 120-char schema limit (Astro content collection); first batch of v1.2 shortDescs were too long, fixed.
Skills are markdown documents that prompt Claude's behavior — updating SKILL.md prose IS implementing v1.2.
user_preferences: User picks options when given clear choices; comfortable saying 'go with defaults'.
Prefers to scope the work with sharp questions before building; willing to approve big plans in one pass.
Linear for the v1.2 hero scenario (not Jira).

next_actions: Manual visual verification on staging: confirm v1.2 pill renders at expected size; confirm /changelog reads well; click through to each linked scenario.
Run local dev server + click through demo workbench to verify scenarios 7, 8, 9 are pickable and play correctly end-to-end.
When ready: npm run deploy:staging, eyeball, then npm run deploy. Per CLAUDE.md, deploys are manual from a wrangler-logged-in laptop.
Optional Sprint 5 (post-ship): add Playwright e2e coverage for /changelog and the new scenarios to lighthouserc warn assertions.

skill_state.depends_on: checkpoint-protocol v1.0; existing scenario format in site/src/data/walkthroughs/
